comment.body:
it is a very complex reflexive effect. 
whenever you long an option, you long the vol (bcs you long vega = vol).
so if you long a VIX call, you long the vol of VIX.
But don't forget the VIX is the IV of the NEXT 30 days SPX contracts. This is why VIX expo is always 30 days before the SPX expo. 
So w
when you long a vix call, you long vanna and vomma on the next 30 days SPX options
comment.raw_body:
